x.title:
Q1 tonnage to orbit by launch provider.

Once Starship is flying hourly, SpaceX’s mass to orbit will be about 100 times
x.summary:
Q1 tonnage to orbit by launch provider.

Once Starship is flying hourly, SpaceX’s mass to orbit will be about 100 times more than everyone else combined, even if they triple their current launch rate.
x.author: elonmusk

x.title: Agents are motivating so many healthy software habits. Open APIs, documentation (skills), tests (evals), Unix (CLIs), pa
x.summary:
Agents are motivating so many healthy software habits. Open APIs, documentation (skills), tests (evals), Unix (CLIs), payment & commerce protocols, even wide 𝙰𝚌𝚌𝚎𝚙𝚝 use (markdown/json/html).

The original vision of the WWW coming to life before our eyes.
